name: Agent Loop
description: Autonomous agent that loops between LLM and tools until task completion.

provides_nodes.name: Agent Loop
provides_nodes.description: Autonomous agent that loops between LLM and tools until no more tool calls.

provides_nodes.name: RLM Agent Loop
provides_nodes.description: Recursive Language Model agent for processing arbitrarily long inputs via REPL environment. Enables handling of inputs exceeding normal context limits.

provides_nodes.name: REPL Environment
provides_nodes.description: Initializes a persistent REPL state for RLM processing. Extracts user input and stores it as a variable outside the context window.

provides_nodes.name: Hybrid Agent Loop
provides_nodes.description: Agent loop that combines standard tool calling with RLM-style adaptive output routing. Large tool outputs are stored as named variables instead of bloating the context window. Provides access to both standard and RLM variable-access tools (GetVariable, Peek, Search, Chunk).

provides_nodes.name: Goal Pursuit Agent
provides_nodes.description: Hybrid agent with integrated planning, per-step evaluation, and autonomous replanning. Creates its own step-by-step plan, executes each step via the hybrid tool loop, evaluates the outcome with an LLM judge, and revises the plan when steps fail — up to max_replan_depth times.
